default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review weekly growth metrics and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**SEO Performance:** Overall SEO metrics (Ahrefs, GSC) are declining, creating a disconnect with the positive traffic reported in Posthog. GrowthX will investigate the cause.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The "AI coding system" article's success (300 visits/wk, high install page visits) provides a model for future bottom-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Messaging Update:** The "200k token context window" claim is not a differentiator (it's a default) and must be replaced with new benchmark data Sylvain provided.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The UXL project is stalled pending documentation from Jason, who is currently focused on the MCP launch.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

## Topics

### SEO & Traffic Discrepancy

  - [**Problem:** A disconnect exists between positive traffic trends in Posthog and declining overall SEO metrics (Ahrefs, GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Hypotheses:**](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [A recent Google algorithm update (Oct) is impacting performance.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [Competitor activity (e.g., Cursor's funding) is affecting branded search.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will conduct a quick audit to identify the root cause of the decline.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Success Model:** The "AI coding system" article is a high-performing model for bottom-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Performance:** \~300 visits/week, driving high install page visits.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Its success stems from a backlink exercise \~1.5 months ago, proving the value of targeted promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**New Focus:** The "code review" topic is a new priority, with 3 articles published and a backlog in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Optimization:** GrowthX is rewriting content to improve CTAs and fix formatting issues (e.g., tables) that hinder conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Messaging & Benchmark Data

  - [**Problem:** The "200k token context window" claim is not a differentiator, as it's a default capability.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Solution:** Sylvain provided new benchmark data and copy from the upcoming Context Engine landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will use this to create more compelling CTAs and update existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Project Blocker: UXL

  - [**Status:** The UXL project is stalled.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Reason:** Awaiting documentation from Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Context:** Jason is currently focused on the MCP launch, which is delaying the UXL work.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Conduct a quick audit to identify the cause of the SEO decline.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Unpack the source and intent of branded search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [Update content and CTAs with the new benchmark data.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [Follow up with Jason on the UXL documentation during their 1:1 tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/XirDJtnpXm7yX_w7o-uVn1qysMyFvMwr?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

action_items.description: Audit Augment Code SEO (Ahrefs/GSC); unpack branded; ID dip causes; share w/ Sylvain
